main.name: Pankeel Shah
main.title: Software Engineer
main.description: I build scalable software and delightful user experiences.
main.bio2: I'm a software engineer who loves crafting full-stack products, from intuitive frontends to robust backend services. I've shipped production code at Fortune 500 companies, built side projects that tens of thousands of people use, and I'm always hunting for the next interesting problem to solve.
main.bio3: Outside of work you'll find me watching films, hitting the gym, or cooking up something new. Always happy to connect. Feel free to reach out!
main.contactMessage: Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or simply want to say hi, my inbox is always open.

education.description: Graduated with a 3.78 GPA. Relevant coursework: Algorithms & Data Structures, User Interface Design, Internet Programming, Intro to AI, Computer Vision, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Operating Systems, Animation & Game Planning, Discrete Structures.

work.title: Software Development Engineer
bullets: Designed and developed Change Order and Purchase Order APIs using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, DocumentDB, SQS, and SNS, preventing $800K in vendor overpayments.

Developed critical React and TypeScript features for the Change Order and Purchase Order modules, improving financial oversight of $5.24B in construction budgets and resolving $50.6M in inflated budgets.
Designed and developed a Material Catalog API using AWS Lambda, S3, and Neptune, centralizing construction cost data with a 99.9% API success rate, handling over 500,000 API calls per day.
Led the evaluation and integration of an upstream team's location API, streamlining site onboarding and saving over 1,000 manual work hours per month.

work.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Created applications to automatically audit freight invoices worth over $100 million annually.
Designed and developed an event driven application designed to estimate loads for finance partners.
Worked with partner teams to create a test gift card generator and UI for internal testing.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Modernized store procedures for barcodes by developing Spring Boot and Kotlin microservices.
Deployed a Praxis UI allowing users to generate and scan random weight barcodes.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Designed and managed human-readable acceptance tests using SpecFlow.
Developed automated tests to verify requirements for the CareLink Network using .NET and Selenium.

projects.title: WECharity – MN

projects.title: RecoverPlaysTV
projects.category: Helps users recover PlaysTV clips lost after the platform shut down.

projects.title: Flappy Bird AI
projects.category: Recreated Flappy Bird and trained an AI using neuroevolution to achieve high scores.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
projects.category: Cross-platform Tic-Tac-Toe mobile app built with React Native.

projects.title: FortniteHub
